markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff call to align on goals and strategy for the GrowthX engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Primary Goal:** Achieve top AI search visibility for FedRAMP-related queries (e.g., "how to get FedRAMPed"), making Knox the definitive answer.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [**Core Differentiator:** Knox’s “come as you are” model contrasts with competitor Palantir’s restrictive approach, which forces customers to re-architect their apps.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=2522.0)
  - [**Strategic Asset:** The new `govcontracts.com` tool will be a key content engine, providing prospects with data to build their business case for government sales.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=2696.0)
  - [**Immediate Focus:** Leverage the March 10th Series A and RSA CISO announcements to build momentum and establish market authority.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=2162.0)

## Topics

### The Challenge: Low AI Visibility

  - [**Problem:** Knox is invisible in AI searches for FedRAMP guidance (e.g., "how to get FedRAMPed"), a critical discovery channel.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [**Goal:** Consistently appear as the top result for these queries.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [**Secondary Goal:** Improve traditional SEO for relevant keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [**Success Metric:** Alexi (Head of Demand Gen) will define specific, measurable targets.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)

### The Solution: Knox's Differentiated Model

  - [**The Problem:** FedRAMP is a massive barrier—3 years, $3M, and requires a federal sponsor.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [**Knox's "Luxury Condo" Model:** A pre-authorized, secure landing zone where customers deploy their existing code.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [**"Rent":** $500k/year (up from $350k).](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=2641.0)
      - [**"Utilities":** Pass-through hosting costs (AWS, Azure, GCP).](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=2655.0)
  - [**Key Differentiator vs. Palantir:**](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=2522.0)
      - [**Knox:** "Come as you are" → deploy existing code into a single-tenant subaccount.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=2606.0)
      - [**Palantir:** "My house, my rules" → requires customers to re-architect their apps, often creating a separate, outdated federal version.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=2522.0)
  - [**Value-Add:** Knox connects customers directly with government buyers.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
      - [**Example:** The BigID case study features Carrie Lee (former VA CIO), lending immense credibility for BigID's target market.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)

### The Strategy: Content & Tools

  - [**Current State:** Content is minimal, relying on Irina's LinkedIn and recycled press releases. The blog is "anemic."](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
  - [**New Content Engine: `govcontracts.com`**](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=2696.0)
      - [**Purpose:** A free tool providing prospects with data to build a business case for government sales.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=2696.0)
      - [**Function:** Replaces unusable government sites (e.g., SAM.gov) by showing:](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=2882.0)
          - [Relevant RFPs](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=2696.0)
          - [Competitor government contracts & revenue](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=2696.0)
      - [**Plan:** Launch as a standalone site with a dedicated paid digital strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=2947.0)
  - [**GrowthX Support:**](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
      - [**Tool:** Provide a custom workspace on GrowthX's B2B AI visibility platform to track performance.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
      - [**Guidance:** Use the `govcontracts.com` concept to build a directory of searchable company pages, similar to the Brex "Charge Finder" prototype.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=3124.0)

### Upcoming Milestones

  - [**March 2nd Week:** New product & other pages go live on the website.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [**March 10th:** Announce $25M Series A funding (timed to build momentum before RSA).](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=2162.0)
  - [**RSA Conference:** Announce a major CISO hire, expected to be a top-tier event announcement.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=2197.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Heidi:** Grant GrowthX access to GA4, Google Search Console, and Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=3545.0)
  - [**Paulina:** Provide GrowthX with the W2 PR firm's editorial calendar and the Granola sales call data.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=2307.0)
  - [**Josh:** Provide GrowthX with an editable version of the brand/content slide deck.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=3583.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=3606.0)
      - [Review the Nexus kickoff keynote for product/market context.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
      - [Deliver a content strategy next week, incorporating all shared materials.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=3606.0)
      - [Schedule a recurring weekly sync.](https://fathom.video/share/-_P-e6UevVVRADxuea6Vw3x8oxhLybh6?tab=summary&timestamp=3606.0)
